title: DShield (Cowrie) Honeypot Stats and When Sessions Disconnect, (Mon, Mar 30th)

rules.sigma:
title: CDB APEX v37.0 - DShield (Cowrie) Honeypot Stats and When Sessions Disconnect
status: experimental
author: CyberDudeBivash SENTINEL APEX
date: 2026/04/01
logsource:
    category: firewall
detection:
    selection_dns:
        query:
            - '*commands.command*'
            - '*commands.session*'
            - '*containerd.io*'
            - '*cowrie.zip*'
            - '*docker.asc*'
            - '*docker.list*'
            - '*docs.cowrie.org*'
            - '*download.docker.com*'
            - '*isc.sans.edu*'
            - '*sessions.session*'
            - '*shstrtab.text*'
            - '*sources.list*'
            - '*userdb.example*'
            - '*www.dshield.org*'
    condition: selection_ip
level: high
rules.yara:
rule CDB_APEX_DShield__Cowrie__Honeypot_Stats_and_When {
    meta:
        description = "DShield (Cowrie) Honeypot Stats and When Sessions Disconnect"
        author = "CyberDudeBivash"
    strings:
        $h0 = "646af726da8182da9910c4a50aac4f648808de4f9f98bc26058ea190e9bf8e20" ascii nocase
        $h1 = "b0d1282989c786cffe85093947f307a26f20601c2f039efc88e3b692d670d076" ascii nocase
        $h2 = "bb403e1761fed33c966d99393630c16ae138ec887b9b32befe6f1bae5f2bc13d" ascii nocase
    condition:
        any of them
}
